meaning: n.<美口>矮小的人或东西adj.矮小的
examples: At first glance, PeeWee PC's Pivot Tablet Laptop is a formidable rival to the long-standing OLPC XO.
PeeWee PC loads each Pivot Tablet Laptop with 10 age appropriate software and game titles for Pre-K, Early Elementary, or Upper Elementary students.
PeeWee also includes its proprietary security suite on each laptop, giving parents full control of how and when their children use the laptop.
